# Antek Automation
> UK AI automation agency building AI voice agents, chatbots and workflow automation for service businesses. Based in Hampshire, serving UK-wide.

## About
- Trading name: Antek Automation (sole trader)
- Founded by: Andy Norman (30+ years in technology)
- Location: Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover, Hampshire SP10 1LZ
- Phone: 0333 038 9960
- Email: hello@antekautomation.com
- ICO Registration: ZC133436
- DUNS Number: 235593033
- Certified Retell AI Partner, FSB Member
- Target market: UK businesses, tradespeople, SMEs and SMBs

## Core Services
- [AI Receptionist](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist): Productised AI phone answering. Screens callers, captures details, books appointments 24/7. Starter £97/month (120 call minutes) + £249 setup. Standard £198/month (240 mins). Pro: contact sales. £0.18/min overage. CRM and API integrations from Standard tier.
- [AI Voice Agents](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-voice-assistants): Custom 24/7 AI call answering. Same tier structure as AI Receptionist. Workflow automations included on Pro tier.
- [AI Chatbots](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-chatbots): Website chat agents that qualify leads and book appointments. From £57/month + £149 setup. Unlimited conversations.
- [Workflow Automation](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/workflow-automation): n8n-based automation connecting 400+ tools. From £250 one-off. Clients typically save 10–20 hours/week on admin.
- [GEO Audits](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/geo-audit): AI search visibility audit across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, Gemini. Quick Check £247, Full Audit £497, Audit + Fix £997. All delivered within 24 hours. Monthly retainer from £497/month.
- [Pricing](https://www.antekautomation.com/pricing): Full pricing page with all tiers, comparison table, and FAQ.

## Key Facts
- Support: 24-hour standard response, 4-hour critical incident response. Included on all plans.
- Data: Call recordings retained 90 days, chat transcripts 12 months. UK/EU data residency. GDPR compliant. DPA available on request.
- Setup: Voice and chat products live in 24–48 hours. Workflow automation 1–14 days.
- No long-term contracts. All monthly plans roll month-to-month.

- /pricing - Full pricing page (all products, all tiers)
